title: Ginger Ray Gold Wedding Bubbly Drinks Wall Holder Hen Party Decoration
availability_text: Only 15 left in stock (more on the way).
features: Make your very own Fizz corner with our drinks wall
Use this wall to Wow your guests at any celebration by uniquely displaying your Bubbles on the wall
Pack contains 1 wall and holds 10 glasses
description: From the manufacturer Drinks Wall Holder Stand Watch your guests faces light up when they see our Prosecco Wall. Make your very own Prosecco corner that will keep your guests happy. A finishing touch to an unforgettable day. Place our Prosecco wall on a table with our treats stand for a display your guests will never forget. The drinks wall has gold foil script spelling ' Bubbles' the perfect finish to a dreamy wedding. Each pack contains 1 wall with 2 stands. Each wall measures 60cm (H). The pack contains 10 drink holders. The holders measure 4cm (H).
